<task_result>
Here is a comprehensive overview of the project:

---

## Project Overview: `ferienwohnung`

### 1. Folder Structure

The project is extremely lean — a **pure static website** with only 3 core files at the root level:

```
/Users/rene/Develop/opencode/ferienwohnung/
├── index.html          # The entire single-page website (313 lines)
├── styles.css          # All styling (715 lines)
├── CNAME               # GitHub Pages custom domain config
├── README.md           # Setup/deployment instructions
├── .git/               # Git repository (remote: github.com:rpreissel/ferienwohnung)
└── .opencode/          # OpenCode AI tooling (package.json with @opencode-ai/plugin)
```

There are **no subdirectories** for assets, no build system, no node_modules at the project root, and no bundler configuration whatsoever.

---

### 2. Project Type & Tech Stack

- **Type:** Pure static HTML/CSS single-page landing page ("Landingpage")
- **Framework:** None — zero JavaScript frameworks, no React/Vue/Svelte
- **Build system:** None — no Webpack, Vite, Parcel, etc.
- **Hosting:** GitHub Pages, deployed directly from the `main` branch root
- **Custom domain:** `ferienwohnung.preissel-hh.de` (via Goneo DNS / CNAME record)
- **Git remote:** `git@github.com:rpreissel/ferienwohnung.git`
- **JavaScript:** Minimal — a single inline `<script>` tag that just sets the current year in the footer (`new Date().getFullYear()`)
- **Fonts:** Google Fonts via CDN — `Plus Jakarta Sans` (body) and `Bricolage Grotesque` (headings)
- **Icons:** Inline SVGs throughout (no icon library dependency)

---

### 3. HTML / Content Structure

The page is a **vacation rental (Ferienwohnung) landing page in German** for an apartment in Hamburg-Wellingsbüttel. It is a single `index.html` with the following sections:

| Section | Anchor | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Navigation (`<header>`) | `#top` | Sticky topbar with brand name, nav links, and a "Jetzt anfragen" CTA button |
| **Hero** | `#top` | Split layout: large apartment photo left, info card right (title, stats bar: 2 guests / 1 bedroom / 1 bed / 1 bathroom, two CTA buttons) |
| **Highlights** | `#ueberblick` | 4-card grid: "Neu eingerichtet", "Flexibler Check-in", "Ruhige Grünlage", "Voll ausgestattet" — each with inline SVG icon |
| **Beschreibung** | _(no anchor)_ | 2-column: description text left, 2 photos right |
| **Galerie** | _(no anchor)_ | 4-photo horizontal grid |
| **Ausstattung** | `#ausstattung` | 8 amenity tiles in a 4-column grid (Küche, Schlafen, Bad, TV/WLAN, Waschen, Parken, Arbeitsplatz, Extras) |
| **Lage** | `#lage` | 2-column: location/transport checklist left, photo right |
| **Kontakt** | `#kontakt` | Dark green gradient banner with email contact link (`ferienwohnung@preissel-hh.de`) |
| **Footer** | — | Copyright with registration number `52-0032149-23`, placeholder "Impressum · Datenschutz" links |

---

### 4. Images / Assets

There are **no local image files** in the repository. All images are **hotlinked directly from Airbnb's CDN** (`a0.muscache.com`). The specific listing is Airbnb Hosting ID `866424181257586195`.

Images used (all `?im_w=720` Airbnb CDN URLs):

| Usage | Alt Text |
|---|---|
| Hero (main photo) | Helles Wohn-/Schlafzimmer mit TV und Dachschräge |
| Description section (×2 photos) | Außenansicht des Hauses; Küche mit Arbeitsplatz |
| Gallery (×4 photos) | Wohn-/Schlafzimmer, Schlafbereich, Küche und Essplatz, Spülmaschine und Kühlschrank |
| Lage section | Außenansicht des Hauses in Wellingsbüttel |

Note: The hero image and first gallery image are the **same URL** (same main room shot). The house exterior image and the description section's second image are also the **same URL**.

---

### 5. Config Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `CNAME` | `ferienwohnung.preissel-hh.de` — GitHub Pages custom domain |
| `.git/config` | Git remote: `git@github.com:rpreissel/ferienwohnung.git`, branch `main` |
| `.opencode/package.json` | Only dependency: `@opencode-ai/plugin 1.15.12` (OpenCode AI tooling, not part of the website itself) |
| `README.md` | Step-by-step instructions for GitHub Pages deployment and Goneo DNS setup |

There is **no `package.json` at the project root**, no `tsconfig.json`, no `.eslintrc`, no `.prettierrc`, no `vite.config`, and no other build/tool configuration — the project needs none.

---

### Summary

This is a **minimal, self-contained German-language vacation rental website** — a single HTML file + one CSS file, hosted on GitHub Pages at a custom domain. It targets a Hamburg apartment and was clearly designed as a clean, modern Airbnb-alternative direct-booking landing page. The README even notes two open action items: replacing placeholder contact data with real data, and optionally swapping the Airbnb CDN images for locally hosted photos.
</task_result>
</task>
